summary: Results-oriented Technical Product Manager with a robust Full-Stack Web Developer foundation and over a decade of experience transforming digital marketing and product landscapes. Currently guiding software solutions powering core marketing infrastructure for a $1B+ annual revenue company. Distinguished by a unique blend of deep technical expertise (full-stack development, system architecture, hands-on coding) and sharp strategic business acumen, consistently delivering innovative solutions, driving substantial cost savings, optimizing efficiency, and leading cross-functional teams effectively.

philosophy.intro: My approach as a Technical Product Manager is rooted in:

principles.title: Strategic Technical Execution
principles.description: Leveraging deep full-stack development expertise to architect and directly contribute to impactful digital solutions that are tightly aligned with strategic business objectives and deliver measurable results, including significant revenue support and cost efficiencies.

principles.title: Data-Driven, User-Obsessed Innovation
principles.description: Championing the use of analytics, A/B testing, and user feedback to drive continuous product improvement, optimize user experiences, and ensure solutions solve meaningful problems effectively, leading to enhanced engagement and tangible business outcomes.

principles.title: Collaborative Leadership & Agile Delivery
principles.description: Fostering strong partnerships across marketing, IT, sales, and engineering to streamline development, spark innovation, and tackle complex challenges with efficient, scalable solutions delivered through Agile methodologies.

marketing_crm_tools: HubSpot (API Mastery, Custom Objects, Workflows, Multi-Org)

careerHighlights.title: Led Product Strategy for $1B+ Revenue Platforms
careerHighlights.description: At Brightland Homes, directed product strategy and Agile delivery for web platforms (Custom CMS ARC, Corporate Websites) vital to over $1 billion in annual revenue, driving UX improvements and significant cost savings.

careerHighlights.title: Delivered Enterprise CMS 30% Under Budget ($75K Savings)
careerHighlights.description: Spearheaded the full lifecycle of the ARC Custom CMS and Website project, delivering it 30% under budget, realizing $75,000 in total savings.

careerHighlights.title: TV Signage Platform Transformation ($300K Hardware Cost Avoidance)
careerHighlights.description: As Web Specialist at Gehan Homes, architected and delivered a TV signage platform solution avoiding $300,000 in hardware costs and boosting lead generation by 8%.

careerHighlights.title: Multi-Org HubSpot Integration & Automation (ARC Connect)
careerHighlights.description: Architected and implemented ARC Connect for multi-organization HubSpot integrations with AWS, enhancing system efficiency, scalability, and automating complex data sharing.

careerHighlights.title: Significant Operational Cost Reductions & Performance Gains
careerHighlights.description: Achieved substantial annual savings through Google Maps API optimization ($50K), revalidation logic optimization (~$3K), HubSpot automation ($700/month), and API/DB optimizations (~$7K). Simultaneously boosted website performance (PageSpeed 60-99, +40% engagement).

careerHighlights.title: SEO-Driven Growth & Marketing Tech Implementation at NewBlue Inc.
careerHighlights.description: Boosted website conversion by 34% and revenue by 17% via SEO. Increased lead collection by ~180% and traffic by 40% through integrated digital marketing and hands-on WordPress development.

careerHighlights.title: E-commerce Sales & Operational Success (Avacomtech & Ufeelgood)
careerHighlights.description: Drove 259% sales growth in 3 months at Avacomtech through listing optimization. Achieved 30% YoY revenue growth at Ufeelgood by expanding sales channels and SEO.
